svg.title: CodeZero full architecture with Cloudflare tunnel and MCPAuthKit
svg.desc: Four-layer architecture: Claude.ai connects through Cloudflare edge (tunnel plus MCPAuthKit OAuth) to the local CodeZero Bun server, which manages Claude Code subprocess sessions on the local filesystem. Web UI and terminal connect directly to the local server.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about how Claude.ai connects to CodeZero via MCP')
sendPrompt('How does the CodeZero web UI connect?')
sendPrompt('How does the terminal channel relay work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Cloudflare Tunnel work in CodeZero?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about OpZero-sh/MCPAuthKit and how it handles OAuth 2.1')
sendPrompt('How does the MCP handler in CodeZero work?')
sendPrompt('How does CodeZero route API requests?')
sendPrompt('How does SSE event streaming work in CodeZero?')
sendPrompt('How does CodeZero manage Claude Code session processes?')
sendPrompt('How do Claude Code subprocess sessions work?')
sendPrompt('How does CodeZero discover and access local projects?')

svg.text: Self-hostable · bring your own domain · automated setup via scripts/init.sh
